findings.summary: Fixed all 185 TS7006 'parameter implicitly has an any type' errors across source and test files. Source files: workspace.ts (7 errors), data-migration.ts (2), project.ts (2), fence.ts (1), todo.ts (1), v2/session.ts (1) = 15 total. Test files: ~170 errors across 27 test files. All fixed with explicit type annotations — no changes to db.ts or Transaction type.
